title: Device Settings - Settings screen for disconnected device
scenario: Device Settings overflow menu does not display Onboarding, User Guides, and Delete Device options when headset is disconnected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is currently connected to the app.
4. Disconnect the headset (e.g., turn off the headset or disable Bluetooth on the phone).
5. On the Home screen, tap the device name or tile to open the Device Settings screen for the disconnected headset.
6. On the Device Settings screen, locate and tap the "..." (More options) button.
7. Observe the list of settings tabs that appear.
expected: The \"...\" menu should display settings tabs such as Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, and Delete Device. The available tabs may vary slightly between different Poly devices.
